overview_summary: None of the four neighboring landowners have an explicitly documented stance on development, leaving all stances classified as unknown. All four also appear to have low community influence, with no high-profile positions or public leadership roles identified among them.

neighbors.name: Steven J. Brennan & Francesca Brennan
neighbors.claims: Steven J. Brennan is a licensed real estate broker based in Tucson, Arizona ([services.azre.gov](https://services.azre.gov/PublicDatabase/DetailEntity.aspx?Id=35135#:~:text=Business%20Address%201501%20N%20HOUGHTON,HOUGHTON%20DR%20TUCSON%20AZ%2085749)) ([services.azre.gov](https://services.azre.gov/PublicDatabase/DetailEntity.aspx?Id=35135#:~:text=BR565567000%20Name%20BRENNAN%2C%20STEVEN%20J,License%20Type%20Real%20Estate%20Broker)). The Brennans jointly own land in Cochise County but are non-resident landowners (their mailing address is in Pima County) ([services.azre.gov](https://services.azre.gov/PublicDatabase/DetailEntity.aspx?Id=35135#:~:text=Business%20Address%201501%20N%20HOUGHTON,HOUGHTON%20DR%20TUCSON%20AZ%2085749)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Approach via formal communication and provide factual project information, as they live outside the community and have no known position.

neighbors.name: Adam Chabal

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage quietly one-on-one to introduce the project and listen to his views, since he has maintained a low profile publicly.
